ai_suggestion: For today's shifting temperatures in Addis Ababa, wear a breathable cotton t-shirt or blouse paired with dark-wash denim, topped with a chic, lightweight cardigan or a structured utility jacket you can easily shed. Bring along a stylish pair of sunglasses to handle the bright intervals and a light scarf to protect against the cooler morning and evening air. Since the weather will transition from a brisk 12.2°C to a warm 23.3°C, these versatile layers will keep you feeling comfortable and looking effortlessly polished during your outdoor tasks today.
